mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, full_name, email, status, password FROM users

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.password, u.full_name, u.email, u.status, r.role_id, r.role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.username = #{username}

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.password, u.full_name, u.email, u.status, r.role_id, r.role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users(user_id, username, password, full_name, email, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{password}, #{fullName}, #{email}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{userName}, password = #{password}, full_name = #{fullName}, email = #{email}, status = #{status} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
